violations.text: The hand-washing sink near the garnish prep unit was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

Inspector observed dehydrated citrus fruits on shelves. Per PIC, establishment dehydrates citrus fruits for cocktail beverages. PIC was informed to stop practice, and submit procedures for review by RIDOH. Owner was also called to discuss the issue. He stated the practice would be discontinued, and only fresh fruit would be used. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

Some utensils such as whisks in the clean storage area are displayed with the food contact surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026
Ice buckets are not stored inverted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the basement storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the mixer, especially the underside of the top, have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

Single service items (small aluminum take-out containers & lids) are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the basement storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the can opener base, and wire shelves in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025
The condensate from the beer lines refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025

The floors in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The floor in the basement area near the water heater & grease trap have an accumulation of trash, soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of biofilm and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
Food observed stored on the floor in the basement. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025
Utensils in the kitchen are displayed with the food contact surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
Ice buckets are not stored inverted. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the basement storage area. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: ice machine burners on stove prep/cold drawer units spice door drawer across from chip warmer The chest freezer in the basement has an accumulation of frost and debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
The condensate from the beer lines refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025
The receptacle in the employee toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025

The wall utensil storage area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-400 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, knives, and mixer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items are to be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by small flies observed throughout the establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023

The door to the outside, located in the hallway, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2023

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the food prep and back basement storage areas. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelf beneath food prep sink table, mixer, can opener, grill, burners, and table beneath grill & burners have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023

The floors especially behind & beneath equipment in the cooking area and basement storage areas have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The panels and the ansul system pipes beneath the hood have an accumulation of oil, dust, and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023
